---
title: "🔗 Le Perceptron Multicouche (MLP)"
part: "🔗 Le Perceptron Multicouche (MLP)"
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

{{< include _31_architecture.qmd >}}
{{< include _32_activation.qmd >}}

{{< include _34_limites.qmd >}}
<!-- DYNAMIC_INCLUDES_END -->
